name_cn:
Small size. Brown
🆕FENDI First is here!!
- Large M80019 size 32.5x15x23.5cm
- Small M80018 size 26x9.5x18cm
- Mini M80017 size 11.5x5.5x10cm
Designed by Kim Jones, the first FENDI bag, subverting previous shapes. Metal trim, large logo lock, and a design that combines architectural deconstruction with fashion. Elegant yet cool, instantly eye-catching! Perfect for clutching at evening events, and also looks high-end and chic when crossbody!
